result.summary: Found 3 major issues: text truncation in navigation, game counter mismatch, and cut-off game tiles in grid layouts.

issues.description: Navigation menu item text is truncated - 'Hot Gam...' appears cut off instead of showing full text 'Hot Games' or similar
issues.suggestion: Adjust the navigation container width or font size to accommodate full text without truncation, or implement text overflow handling

issues.description: BetRivers Exclusive Games section shows '0 Games' counter but displays 6 game tiles below, creating a clear data mismatch
issues.suggestion: Update the game counter to display '6 Games' or verify if the games should actually be displayed

issues.description: Game tiles in both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are visually cut off on the right side, suggesting improper grid/carousel sizing
issues.suggestion: Adjust the responsive grid layout to properly display all tiles without overflow, or implement proper carousel/scrolling functionality for partially visible tiles
